name: spec-ops
description: Spec workflow by Zak Sakata: write-spec drafts concise, scannable feature specs that open with a flat, id'd Acceptance Criteria contract (optionally organized into ordered named groups); refine-spec hardens a draft into an accurate, not-over-engineered, implementation-ready spec via a grounded multi-pass review loop and commits the grounded AC group order; launch-spec compiles a verified spec into the self-contained /goal driver that implements it, gated on every acceptance criterion (emit-only); verify-spec checks that the implementation actually matches the spec's claims and every acceptance criterion, grounded against the real code, git history, and live state, and flags delivered code that maps to no criterion (backward coverage).
